transcript: Well, no... I don't know somethin' about no fish.
Fist. You ready to meet up with my fist?
You ready to meet up with it?
No, not yet. You better come prepared, whoever it is. Well if you're gonna bring your fists right... well, you're gonna get a goddamn club across you, or a shotgun in your belly.
Why don't you go stick your head in a goddamn toilet and flush it.
You can go lay an egg.
Ready to meet up with my clamp?
Why don't you shut up and go... someplace... I don't know where the hell you'd go, but I do-- you wouldn't be welcome there anyway.
Listen here, bud. I don't know how stupid you are.
I got my shotgun right here ready for you. You step out the door and I'll blow your goddamn head off.
If you're a cop, you're a goddamn... I don't know what kinda cop you are, but ya... I got my fist up here ready to whack ya out in the goddamn teeth.
I'm gonna punch you in the lip.
Oh, okay. That's your... your whip?
Oh... Where is this located at?
It's going to be located in your mouth pretty quick.
